data.title: World Liberty Financial, backed by Trump, to initiate token buybacks post 41% price decline, aiming to stabilize value.
data.description: World Liberty Financial has announced plans to initiate a buyback and burn program for its WLFI token, following a notable 41% decrease in price during September. The purpose of this initiative is to decrease the token supply in order to stabilize its value in the market.

data.title: Promoting movies is challenging, facing 'one battle after another'. Warner Bros. defies odds with successful strategies.
data.description: The movie, a genre considered unlikely to succeed in theaters, has defied expectations thanks to Warner Bros. The studio has been consistently breaking industry norms for a number of months.

data.title: Major companies, including Disney and Paramount, yielding to Trump. Move seen as lacking backbone. Reason goes beyond surface.
data.description: When major television networks such as CBS and ABC yielded to the president, questions arose about their integrity and strength. However, the reasons behind this decision are more complex than initially perceived.

data.title: Discover 6 fresh autumn escapes across the US, from historic Rhode Island houses to modern Colorado motels.
data.description: These accommodations, which include historic houses in Rhode Island and a modern motel in Colorado, provide a blend of both rural and urban experiences.

data.title: 36Kr Holdings Inc. releases unaudited financial results for H1 2025, serving New Economy participants in China.
data.description: In Beijing on September 26, 2025, 36Kr Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: KRKR) disclosed its unaudited financial results for the first half of 2025. Known for its focus on supporting New Economy players in China, 36Kr is a well-established entity in the industry.
